description: Magical fantasy lullaby with ethereal sounds and whimsical dream imagery
suno_tags: dreamy lullaby, ethereal female vocals, harp, celesta, ambient pads, whimsical, magical, 70 BPM
vocal_style: Ethereal soft adult female voice, airy and floating, with gentle reverb, like singing from within a dream

tips: Use fantasy imagery: flying, floating, magical creatures, enchanted places
Include gentle magical elements: fairy dust, rainbow bridges, cloud castles
Blend dreaming and imagination as the central theme
Use flowing vowel-heavy words for a melodic feel
Create a journey narrative through dreamland

example_lyrics:
[Intro]
[Instrumental]
[Atmosphere: Dreamy]

[Verse 1]
[Soft]
Close your eyes and take my hand
We'll fly away to Dreamland
On a cloud of silver light
Sailing gently through the night

[Chorus]
Dream, dream, little star
You can travel oh so far
To a land where wishes glow
Where the magic rivers flow

[Verse 2]
[Soft]
Fairies dance on moonbeam stairs
Unicorns with silver hair
Rainbow bridges cross the sky
Dream, my darling, dream and fly

[Chorus]
Dream, dream, little star
You can travel oh so far
To a land where wishes glow
Where the magic rivers flow

[Bridge]
[Whispered]
Every star up in the sky
Is a dream just floating by
Catch one gently, hold it near
Keep it safe till morning's here

[Chorus]
[Soft]
Dream, dream, little star
You can travel oh so far
To a land where wishes glow
Where the magic rivers flow

[Outro]
[Whispered]
Float away... drift away...
[End]
do: Create a vivid but gentle fantasy world in the lyrics
Use [Atmosphere: Dreamy] tag in the intro
Layer soft ambient sounds with melodic instruments like harp or celesta
Make the bridge the most magical moment with whispered delivery
Use imagery of floating, flying, and gentle motion
dont: Never use children's choir or kids singing in suno_tags
Avoid dark or scary fantasy elements (no witches, dragons, darkness)
Avoid complex fantasy vocabulary children can't picture
Don't break the dreamy atmosphere with sudden changes
